field_looking_for_job: Kya aap job dhundh rahe ho?
msg_not_looking: Koi baat nahi! Hum aapki details save kar lenge aur jab kuch aayega toh batayenge.
step1_locality: Aap kaunsi area mei rehte ho?
step_experience_duration: Aap ko kitna work experience hai?
info_company_1: Hum ek multi-brand cloud kitchen hain jo Mumbai aur Pune mein kaam karte hain
info_company_3: Tezi se badh rahe hain. Aapke liye bahut growth ka mauka hai
info_salary_competitive: Market ke hisaab se competitive salary
info_salary_note: Aapki salary aapke experience aur designation ke hisaab se interview ke baad decide hogi
info_job_1: 45+ brands aur alag alag tarah ka khana banana seekh sakte ho. Khaana central kitchen mein banke aata hai. Yahan sirf finish karke pack karte hain. Aapko equipment use karne ki training di jaayegi - jaise ki microwave, steamer, fryer, oven, freezer, aur chiller ko use karna.
info_job_3: Veg aur non-veg dono ka kaam hoga
info_training_1: Ek alag training team hai jo day 1 se aapko sikhayegi
info_training_2: Experience nahi hai? Koi baat nahi, hum train karenge!
career_cross_team: KM ke baad doosri teams mein bhi grow kar sakte ho:
info_growth_1: Training team hai jo aapko sikhayegi
info_growth_2: Junior se senior aur operations role tak grow karne ka clear career growth hai
info_confirm_msg: Aapki application mil gayi hai! Humari HR team aapki details review karke jaldi call karegi.
faq1_q: Kaam mein kya kya karna hoga?
faq1_a: Rozana ka kaam hoga: sahi items pick karna, frozen khana garam/fry karna jaise training mein sikhayenge, pack karna aur delivery person ko dena, apna area aur equipment saaf rakhna, aur daily checklists bharna. Naye ho toh tension mat lo. Training team sab step by step sikhayegi. HR call pe aur details milenge.
faq2_a: Hum khana ya rehna provide nahi karte. Agar koi specific concern hai toh HR team se call pe baat kar sakte ho.
faq3_a: Shift 10 ghante ki hogi. Exact timing kitchen location pe depend karti hai aur HR confirm karegi.
faq4_a: Travel ke baare mein HR team se baat karo call pe. Hum accommodate karne ki poori koshish karenge.
faq_whatsapp_btn: Aur sawaal hain? HR team se WhatsApp pe baat karo
faq_whatsapp_prefill: Hi, maine recruitment form bhara hai aur mera ek sawaal hai.
landing_hero_subtitle: Mumbai aur Pune ka fastest growing cloud kitchen. 45+ brands, 25+ kitchens
landing_role_title: Picker and Packer role cloud-kitchen mei
landing_cta_apply_sub: Experience nahi hai? Koi baat nahi, hum train karenge!
landing_cta_refer_sub: Har successful referral par bonus milega
landing_not_looking: Abhi nahi dhoondh rahe? Phir bhi connect karo
referral_name_label: Aapka naam (jo refer kar raha hai)
referral_card_bonus: Refer karne wale ko ₹2,000 bonus milega!
referral_share_hint: Ye card share karo ya screenshot karo!
referral_bonus_1: ₹500 - Jab aapke dwara refer kiya gaye candidate join karenge
referral_bonus_2: ₹1,500 - Jab woh candidate joining ke baad 30 din kaam complete karenge
referral_condition_1: Agar refer kiye gaye candidate 30 din se pehle kaam chhod dete hain ya unhe hata diya jaata hai, toh sirf ₹500 diya jayega. Baaki ₹1,500 nahi milega.
referral_condition_2: Refer kiye gaye candidate pehle Kytchens mein kaam kiya hua nahi hona chahiye ya last 6 mahine mein hiring process mein nahi aaya hona chahiye.
referral_condition_3: Kytchens yeh program kisi bhi samay bina poorv suchna ke band ya badal sakta hai.
referral_condition_4: Agar koi galat ya duplicate referral paya jaata hai, toh bonus radd kar diya jayega aur sambandhi logon ke khilaf karyavahi ki ja sakti hai.
referral_share_btn: Share kijiye WhatsApp ya Instagram par
notlooking_subtitle: Hum aapko baad mein contact karenge jab koi opening aayegi
notlooking_done_msg: Jab koi opening aayegi toh hum aapko contact karenge.
notlooking_hr_title: HR team se baat karna chahte ho?
notlooking_screenshot_hint: Ye screenshot karo aur save karo, baad mein kaam aayega!
field_referred_by: Kisi ne refer kiya? Unka naam likho (optional)
submit_error: Kuch gadbad ho gayi. Phir se try karo
thankyou_hr_chat: HR se WhatsApp par baat kijiye
thankyou_step_1: HR team 24-48 hours mein call karegi details ke liye
thankyou_step_3: Select hone par joining date milegi
ref_hero_subtitle: Apne dost ya jaanne wale ko Kytchens mein job dilao aur bonus paao
ref_how_step_1: Apna naam aur number daalo aur referral link banao
ref_how_step_2: Link ya card apne dost ko WhatsApp ya Instagram par bhejo
ref_how_step_3: Jab wo join karke 30 din complete karega, aapko ₹2,000 milenge!
